tweets.text:
NEW: An illegal immigrant from Mexico is accused of kidnapping and sodomizing a girl who was under the age of 12 in Lexington, Kentucky.

Jorge Luis Martinez-Ulloa came illegally in 2012 (under Obama) & was supposed to leave the country through "voluntary departure," per @ICEgov. He never left.

He then victimized the young child Saturday, grabbing her by the arm and neck, trapping her in his apartment, and raping her, according to local reports. 

The young child didn't know Martinez-Ulloa. She was later hospitalized for her injuries.

Martinez-Ulloa is charged with kidnapping of a minor, first-degree strangulation, two counts of first-degree rape involving a victim under 12, two counts of first-degree sodomy involving a victim under 12, and two counts of sexual abuse of a victim under 12.

tweets.text:
HUGE: The Chinese-Americans accused of attempting to explode an IED at MacDill Air Force Base Visitor’s center in Tampa were anchor babies for illegal parents, colleague @MaryMargOlohan reports.

DHS nabbed the duo’s parents, Qiu Qin Zou and Jia Zhang Zheng, on March 18 for illegal entry.

The parents applied for asylum in 1993, but were denied by an immigration judge, who issued them a deportation order in 1998. The Board of Immigration Appeals repeatedly denied their attempts to have their case reopened. 

Despite the repeated denials for status, they remained in the US.

https://t.co/t4QIfjbLnW
